SELECT sys.left_shift(ip_range, inet '192.168.1.5') FROM test_ip_range WHERE ip_range = inet '192.168.1/24';
SELECT sys.left_shift(inet '192.168.0.0/16', inet '192.168.1.255') AS is_contained FROM test_ip_range;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM test_ip_range WHERE sys.left_shift(ip_range, inet '192.168.1.1') IS TRUE);
SELECT ip FROM subquery_test WHERE sys.left_shift((SELECT ip_range FROM test_ip_range WHERE ip_range = inet '192.168.1/24'), ip) IS TRUE;
SELECT (CASE WHEN sys.left_shift(inet '192.168.1/24', inet '192.168.1.10') THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END) AS result;
CREATE TABLE multi_join_test (client_ip inet, server_ip inet);
INSERT INTO multi_join_test VALUES (inet '192.168.1.1', inet '192.168.1.10'), (inet '192.168.2.1', inet '192.168.1.10');
SELECT server_ip FROM multi_join_test WHERE sys.left_shift(inet '192.168.1/24', client_ip);
CREATE TABLE complex_conditions (ip inet, condition_boolean boolean);
INSERT INTO complex_conditions VALUES (inet '192.168.1.5', TRUE), (inet '192.168.2.5', FALSE);
SELECT * FROM complex_conditions WHERE sys.left_shift(inet '192.168.1/24', ip) AND condition_boolean = TRUE;
